name: dealer.statuses
query: select id as source_id, name, display_name, created_at as source_created_at, updated_at as source_updated_at from statuses

name: dealer.banks
query: select id, country_id, is_active, display_name, bic, payment_mode, created_at as source_created_at, updated_at as source_updated_at, deleted_at from banks

name: dealer.bank_accounts
query: select id as source_id, bank_id, account_no, account_holder_type, account_holder_id, account_holder_name, status_id, is_default, is_active, has_acknowledge_verification, proof_file_id, remarks, additional_data, created_at as source_created_at, updated_at as source_updated_at, deleted_at from bank_accounts

name: dealer.contact_sources
query: select id as source_id, contact_channel_id, country_id, value, title, created_at as source_created_at, updated_at as source_updated_at, deleted_at from contact_sources

name: dealer.contact_relationships
query: select id as source_id, parent_id, children_id, relation, created_at as source_created_at, updated_at as source_updated_at from contact_relationships

name: dealer.transaction_party_roles
query: select id as source_id, name, display_name, created_at as source_created_at, updated_at as source_updated_at, deleted_at from transaction_party_roles

name: dealer.countries
query: select id, name, display_name, phone_code, country_code, currency_code, currency_symbol, language, timezone, is_active, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from countries
